summary_text: A demo reporting experience built from anonymized workbook data, enriched with historical comparisons and curated qualitative synthesis.
orientation_text: This report combines quantified organizational health indicators with curated qualitative interpretation. Use the filters to inspect how the employee experience varies across departments, employment status, and location clusters. Historical comparisons are anchored on the current reporting year and the most recent prior year with sufficient sample size.
historical_context: Historical comparisons in this demo use workbook-backed data from 2024 and 2025. The 2026 rows are intentionally excluded from primary reporting because the sample is too sparse to support stable comparisons.
how_to_use_text: Use the left navigation to move through the story. Use the three filters independently to compare different demographic cuts. Quantitative pages update across the report, while qualitative pages use curated narrative with filter-aware comment evidence when enough responses are available.
